title: Wasp Removal New Brighton | Staten Island Wasp Control $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional wasp removal in New Brighton, Staten Island. Expert nest elimination for homes & businesses. Same-day service available. Call now: $350-$550.
intro: New Brighton residents dealing with wasp infestations need fast, professional solutions to protect their families and properties. Our licensed wasp removal specialists serve the New Brighton community with safe, effective nest elimination services tailored to Staten Island's unique coastal environment. Whether you're in a historic townhouse near the waterfront or a residential property along the hill, we provide comprehensive wasp control at competitive rates.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of experience serving New Brighton and Staten Island, with certified technicians who understand the specific wasp species common to coastal neighborhoods. We offer same-day service, guaranteed results, and safe removal methods that protect your family, pets, and property throughout the entire process.
localContext: New Brighton's proximity to the Staten Island Ferry terminal and its mix of Victorian-era homes and modern residences creates unique conditions where wasps often nest in eaves, porches, and garden areas. The neighborhood's tree-lined streets and waterfront location make properties particularly attractive to yellow jackets and paper wasps during warmer months.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a wasp nest in New Brighton?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day wasp removal service in New Brighton for most calls received before 2 PM. Our technicians typically arrive within 2-4 hours and can complete nest removal in 30-60 minutes depending on nest size and location. Emergency services are available for severe infestations.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 wasp removal service?
faqs.answer: Our wasp removal service includes a thorough property inspection, complete nest elimination, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, safe disposal of the nest, and a 30-day warranty. The price varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and the number of nests present on your New Brighton property.

faqs.question: Are wasp treatments safe for children and pets in my New Brighton home?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and methods that are safe for residential use. We provide clear instructions on any temporary precautions needed during treatment, and most families can return to normal activities within 2-3 hours of service completion. Pet and child safety is our top priority.

faqs.question: What types of wasps are most common in New Brighton?
faqs.answer: New Brighton properties commonly encounter yellow jackets, paper wasps, and bald-faced hornets. The coastal location and older architecture provide ideal nesting spots in attics, under eaves, in wall voids, and around decks. Our technicians are experienced with all wasp species found in Staten Island and adjust treatment methods accordingly.
